title: Deep Research
promptPlaceholder: Ask anything. The research agent will browse, think, and write a detailed report.

history.banner: History tasks retain milestones and the final report only.

drawer.insertFallback: Editor unavailable — report copied to clipboard

detail.notFoundBody: The task does not exist or you do not have access.
detail.planningNotice: Deep research in progress — initial content usually takes a few minutes…

error.PARENT_NOT_FOUND: Parent task not found or not accessible.
error.PARENT_NOT_COMPLETED: Parent task not completed; follow-up unavailable.
error.PARENT_EXPIRED: Parent task is older than 50 days; follow-up unavailable.
error.UPSTREAM_UNAVAILABLE: Google upstream is unavailable. Please retry later.
error.PROCESS_RESTART: Server restarted mid-stream. Please restart the task.
error.FINAL_REPORT_FETCH_FAILED: Final report generation failed. Please retry.
error.REPORT_UPLOAD_FAILED: Final report upload failed. Please retry.
